activityLog.note: Keeping a loose log so I actually stick with the stretches and get outside. Not counting calories, just showing up.

entry.detail: Easy flat loop with Kyle. Back felt fine after.
Cool morning, good pace. Cranes were out on the water.
Hip openers and the low-back sequence. Needed it after a crawl-space day.
Longer one with Kyle. Steep in spots, took the stretches seriously that night.
Pelvic tilts, cat camel, glute bridges. Ten minutes turned into thirty.
Consistent two weeks running now. Trying to make it a habit, not a flare-day thing.
Quick Saturday loop before the garage. Clear and cold.

goals.goal: Yoga at least twice a month, Wednesday group when it is on
A hike most weekends the weather allows
Do the back routine daily, not just when it hurts
